partition.description: Slurm partition name — must match a key under `rates:` in cost_rates.yaml (§28.1). Unknown partition → ok:false.

cpus.description: CPU cores requested PER NODE. Multiplied by hours and the partition's cpu_hour rate.

gpus.description: GPUs requested PER NODE. Multiplied by hours and the partition's gpu_hour rate. Partitions without gpu_hour treat this as 0-cost.

nodes.description: Node multiplier (§16). Final total = per_node_cost × nodes.

time_limit.description: Slurm-style wall-clock cap (HH:MM:SS or HHH:MM:SS). Cost is computed against this upper bound.
